title: scrophularia canina subsp. ramosissima
intro: Scrophularia canina subsp. ramosissima, also known as the wood betony or ramosissima wood betony, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Scrophularia canina subsp. ramosissima include its ability to promote digestion, calm the nervous system, and act as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Scrophularia canina subsp. ramosissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
